return(function(n,C,B,N,I,x,h,m,u,i,f,J,b,M,E,H,s,j,t,V,o)J,E,b,V,s,o,m,M,i,t,u,f,H,j=function(n,e)local C=t(e)local B=function(...)return M(n,{...},e,C)end return B Q=e(-280776+256231)J=n[Q]U=s[H]g=9188220545882-1022628 T=s[i]r=e(-331811+307094)L=T(r,g)g=-395719+4806361649797 Q=U[L]t=J[Q]Q=j(28793+8832895,{H;i})J=t(Q)Q=e(-554623+530078)r=e(93416-117985)J=n[Q]U=s[H]T=s[i]L=T(r,g)Q=U[L]t=J[Q]Q=j(141905+7125331,{H,i})H=b(H)J=t(Q)i=b(i)else s[i]=F M=s[i]M=M and-30958+13531908 or-938467+10919781 end end end else if M<16077071-196643 then if M<16344706-783329 then if M<16077599-642404 then if M<-469830+15465515 then v=not Z d=d+c D=d<=P D=v and D v=d>=P v=Z and v D=v or D
